title: Cost of Capital: The enterprise value (EV) is equal to the market value...
summary: Calculate or evaluate the cost of capital using appropriate financial models.
prompt: The enterprise value (EV) is equal to the market value of equity minus total debt.
solution: Enterprise value (EV) is the total value of a firm and is calculated as the market value of equity plus total debt, minus cash and cash equivalents. This provides a more comprehensive value of the firm's operations.
